cast.name: 安娜·玛丽亚·韦塞尔契奇 Ana Marija Veselčić

introduction: Lučana, her mother Cvita and brother Stjepko are preparing the house of their recently deceased grandmother for the season. Cvita, the mater familias, sits at the top of the hierarchy in the household. After Cvita, comes Stjepko, because he is a man. Lučana vies for her mother’s love by pulling little pranks on her brother Stjepko. Yet, her efforts are futile because Lučana unfortunately cannot change what she has between her legs.源自：https://tickets.sff.ba/films/2243
